creator: cjk32@cam.ac.uk
text:
Alonso Cárdenas Márquez wrote:
> What about editors/lazarus port? is it compiling/running without
> problems with new version of freepascal?
>
> Greetings
> ACM
>   
> Hi Christopher :)
Hi Alonso,

I'm afraid I only have a headless FreeBSD system so I've not been able
to test the result, but lazarus 0.9.28.2_2 compiled happily in a
tinderbox with the new version of freepascal.  The only requirement was
to set WITHOUT_IBASE=true for fpc-ibase, although looking at
http://www.freshports.org/databases/firebird20-client/, this is no
longer required.

Kind regards,

Chris.
